3187330.name: Sierra Ridge Technologies
3187330.description:
Manage The Reactor

It's the fateful night of September 17th, 2009 - your shift at the Spokane Research Facility begins like any other. Hidden deep beneath the quiet forests of Washington, you and your team are tasked with overseeing the world's first prototype antimatter nuclear reactor. But something is wrong. The alarms are blaring. Systems are failing. Containment is slipping.

Cooperative First-Person Thriller

Manage critical systems in real time as a team of engineers stationed deep underground. Monitor coolant levels, reroute power, and respond to unpredictable events as the AMR destabilizes. Every decision matters - and every second counts.

Will you escape, or save others?

Experience the chaos of a facility on the bring of catastrophe, where teamwork is essential and no playthrough unfolds the same way. Uncover what caused the meltdown - and whether it was really an accident.

Features:

  • Multiplayer

  • First-person systems management and facility control

  • Real-time decision making with branching outcomes

  • 2000s-era retro-futuristic UI and environments

  • Replayable scenarios and multiple endings

  • Unfolding narrative with secrets hidden throughout the facility

No generative AI was used in the creation of this game.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
